# Myna — Source Tree Analysis

**Date:** 2026-05-26
**Repository:** [PrerakGada/myna](https://github.com/PrerakGada/myna) (default branch: `main`)
**Repository type:** multi-part (5 parts in one repo)
**Generated by:** `/bmad-document-project` workflow, exhaustive scan

---

## Overview

Myna is a local-first text-to-speech companion for macOS Apple Silicon. The
repository carries every layer of the product in one tree: a native Swift
menu-bar app, a Python FastAPI daemon, a Next.js marketing site, a shell
CLI, and the full release / install / hotkey infrastructure. Code is
organized **by deliverable, not by language** — each top-level directory is
a thing the user can run, install, or ship.

The codebase was rebuilt from a 322-line Hammerspoon prototype into the
current multi-part shape in a single overnight orchestrated session
(see [STATUS.md](../STATUS.md)) and shipped as v0.1.0 on 2026-05-26
(see [HANDOFF.md](https://github.com/PrerakGada/myna/blob/f5860c8/HANDOFF.md)).

## Multi-Part Structure

This project consists of **5 distinct parts**, each with its own build
chain, test suite, and deployment path:

- **`apps/macos/`** (`macos`) — Native Swift 6 menu-bar app, the user-facing
  product. Distributed as a signed/notarized DMG and via Homebrew cask.
- **`daemon/`** (`daemon`) — Python 3.13 FastAPI daemon binding
  `127.0.0.1:8766`. Distributed as a Homebrew formula (`myna-daemon`).
- **`site/`** (`site`) — Next.js 16 (App Router) marketing site. Deployed
  to Vercel.
- **`cli/`** (`cli`) — A 27-line Bash wrapper that POSTs to the daemon's
  `/speak` v1 endpoint. Symlinked to `~/.local/bin/myna` by `install.sh`.
- **Ops** (`dist/`, `tap/`, `.github/`, `hammerspoon/`, `hooks/`,
  `launchagents/`, `install.sh`) — Release pipeline, Homebrew tap source,
  CI/CD workflows, the v1 Hammerspoon legacy module, Claude Code Stop hook,
  LaunchAgents, and the local-dev installer.

A machine-readable manifest of these parts lives at
[`project-parts.json`](./project-parts.json).

## Complete Directory Structure

```
myna/                              # repo root
├── README.md                      # user-facing landing copy + roadmap
├── STATUS.md                      # overnight rebuild status (historical)
│                                  # (HANDOFF.md deleted post-v0.1.0;
│                                  #  preserved at git commit f5860c8)
├── RELEASE.md                     # operator manual for the release pipeline
├── SECURITY.md                    # threat model + disclosure policy
├── LICENSE                        # MIT
├── CLAUDE.md                      # project instructions for Claude Code agents
├── install.sh                     # one-shot local-dev installer
│
├── apps/                          # PART: macos — Swift menu-bar app
│   └── macos/
│       ├── project.yml            # XcodeGen spec (single source of truth)
│       ├── dev.sh                 # one-command dev loop (xcodegen + build + run)
│       ├── README.md
│       ├── .swift-format
│       ├── .swiftlint.yml
│       ├── Resources/
│       │   ├── Info.plist         # generated by XcodeGen from project.yml
│       │   ├── Myna.entitlements  # apple-events YES; allow-jit NO
│       │   └── Assets.xcassets/   # AppIcon + MenuBarIcon
│       ├── Sources/               # 22 Swift files
│       │   ├── MynaApp/           # @main entry, AppDelegate, AppDispatcher
│       │   ├── Network/           # DaemonClient (actor), DaemonTypes,
│       │   │                      #   SynthesizeStream (multipart parser)
│       │   ├── Audio/             # AudioPlayer (AVAudioEngine + TimePitch),
│       │   │                      #   PlaybackQueue (virtual timeline),
│       │   │                      #   TimePitchUnit
│       │   ├── Input/             # SelectionService (Cmd+C sim + pasteboard
│       │   │                      #   defer-restore), ChromeService
│       │   │                      #   (NSAppleScript w/ 5s timeout),
│       │   │                      #   HotkeyManager (KeyboardShortcuts)
│       │   ├── MenuBar/           # MenuBarController (polls /v2/status @ 1.5s),
│       │   │                      #   MenuBarView (SwiftUI), BirdIcon
│       │   ├── Settings/          # 4-tab TabView + ObservableObject VM
│       │   ├── URLScheme/         # myna:// handler, input validation/clamping
│       │   ├── Updates/           # Sparkle 2 UpdateController
│       │   └── Logging/           # OSLog + file mirror + LogViewerView
│       └── Tests/                 # 14 test files, ~91 tests
│           ├── AudioTests/        # AudioPlayerTests, PlaybackQueueTests, SineBuffer
│           ├── InputTests/        # ChromeService, HotkeyManager, SelectionService
│           ├── MynaAppTests/      # AppLifecycle, FixtureLoader, Log, Skeleton, SendableBox
│           ├── NetworkTests/      # DaemonClient + MockURLProtocol
│           ├── SettingsTests/     # SettingsViewModel
│           └── URLSchemeTests/    # URLSchemeHandler + AuditSecurity regressions
│
├── daemon/                        # PART: daemon — Python FastAPI app
│   ├── pyproject.toml             # name=myna, version=0.2.0, py>=3.10
│   ├── myna/                      # 11 modules, 934 LOC
│   │   ├── __init__.py            # __version__ = "0.2.0"
│   │   ├── __main__.py            # uvicorn entrypoint (`python -m myna`)
│   │   ├── app.py                 # 544 LOC — FastAPI app, all routes
│   │   ├── chunking.py            # text → chunk boundaries for streamed synth
│   │   ├── config.py              # ~/.config/myna/config.json loader + defaults
│   │   ├── engine.py              # mlx-audio (Kokoro) HTTP client
│   │   ├── extract.py             # trafilatura article extraction
│   │   ├── player.py              # v1 afplay subprocess player
│   │   ├── registry.py            # Claude-Code announce/pick in-memory queue
│   │   ├── summarize.py           # Ollama qwen3.5:4b summary, think-toggle
│   │   └── v2_types.py            # Pydantic models for /v2/* contract
│   └── tests/                     # 16 test files, 94 tests passing
│       ├── test_app.py            # v1 surface
│       ├── test_chunking.py
│       ├── test_config.py
│       ├── test_engine.py
│       ├── test_extract.py
│       ├── test_player.py
│       ├── test_registry.py
│       ├── test_summarize.py
│       ├── test_cc_hook.py

│       └── v2_helpers.py          # shared v2 test scaffolding
│
├── site/                          # PART: site — Next.js 16 App Router
│   ├── README.md
│   ├── package.json               # next ^16.2.6, react ^19, ts ^5.7, tailwind ^3.4
│   ├── next.config.mjs            # experimental.optimizePackageImports (phantom: motion)
│   ├── tailwind.config.ts         # custom palette + fonts (read fully)
│   ├── postcss.config.mjs

│   │   └── favicon.svg

│   │   ├── layout.tsx             # html shell, Metadata, font preload
│   │   ├── page.tsx               # the entire landing — composes all components
│   │   └── globals.css            # Tailwind base + a few custom utilities
│   └── components/                # 16 .tsx, all hand-rolled SVG/CSS, no UI lib
│       ├── Nav.tsx, MobileStickyCTA.tsx, MynaMark.tsx, GitHubStar.tsx

├── cli/                           # PART: cli — Bash wrapper

├── dist/                          # PART: ops — release shell scripts
│   ├── _lib.sh                    # shared helpers (bash 3 portable)
│   ├── build.sh                   # xcodegen + xcodebuild archive

│

│   ├── README.md

│
├── hammerspoon/                   # PART: ops — v1 legacy (kept side-by-side)
│   └── myna.lua                   # 322 LOC — pre-Swift hotkeys + menu bar
│
├── .github/
│   ├── workflows/
│   │   ├── ci.yml                 # PR: lint + test (Swift + Python)
│   │   ├── release.yml            # tag v* → 9-job signed/notarized DMG +
│   │   │                          #   Sparkle appcast + tap-bump

│

    ├── source-tree-analysis.md    # ← you are here
```

## Critical Directories

### `apps/macos/Sources/`

The native Swift code. Organized one folder per subsystem:
`MynaApp` (lifecycle), `Network` (DaemonClient actor + multipart parser),
`Audio` (AVAudioEngine pipeline + virtual timeline), `Input` (selection
+ Chrome + hotkeys), `MenuBar`, `Settings`, `URLScheme`, `Updates`
(Sparkle), `Logging`. See [architecture-macos.md](./architecture-macos.md)
for the full breakdown and [component-inventory-macos.md](./component-inventory-macos.md)
for type-by-type signatures.

**Purpose:** The user-facing menu-bar app. Owns hotkeys, audio output,
selection capture, settings UI, and Sparkle update channel.
**Contains:** 22 Swift source files, ~9 KLOC.
**Entry Points:** [MynaApp.swift](../apps/macos/Sources/MynaApp/MynaApp.swift) (`@main`).
**Integration:** Talks to `daemon` at `http://127.0.0.1:8766/v2/*` over HTTP.

### `daemon/myna/`

The Python FastAPI daemon. Endpoints are in
[`app.py`](../daemon/myna/app.py) (single file, 544 LOC). Each external
concern lives in its own module: `engine.py` (Kokoro HTTP),
`extract.py` (trafilatura), `summarize.py` (Ollama), `chunking.py`,
`registry.py` (Claude Code announce/pick), `player.py` (v1 afplay path),
`config.py` (`~/.config/myna/config.json`), `v2_types.py` (Pydantic
contract for `/v2/*`).

**Purpose:** Orchestration brain — turns text/URL into streamed WAV chunks.
**Contains:** 11 source modules + 16 test files, 94 tests.
**Entry Points:** [`__main__.py`](../daemon/myna/__main__.py)
(`python -m myna`).
**Integration:** Calls Kokoro mlx-audio at `127.0.0.1:8765`; serves
HTTP on `127.0.0.1:8766` for the Swift app, CLI, CC hook, and the v1
Hammerspoon module.

### `site/app/` and `site/components/`

The Next.js 16 App Router landing site. Single page with 16 hand-rolled
components — no UI library, all SVG + Tailwind + a single
`IntersectionObserver` scroll-trigger.

**Purpose:** Marketing site, brew install CTA, FAQ, roadmap.
**Contains:** 1 page, 1 layout, 16 components.
**Entry Points:** [`site/app/page.tsx`](../site/app/page.tsx).
**Integration:** Static content; no runtime connection to daemon/app.
Links to GitHub release page for downloads.

### `dist/`

Bash release scripts. Each script is independently `--dry-run`-able.
[`_lib.sh`](../dist/_lib.sh) is the shared utility kept **bash 3
portable** (no `mapfile`, no `${var,,}` lowercasing) because macOS's
built-in bash is 3.2.

**Purpose:** Take a built `.app` from a `git tag v*` push to a signed,
notarized, DMG-packaged, Sparkle-signed, GitHub-released, Homebrew-tap-
bumped public release.
**Contains:** 6 shell scripts (build, sign, notarize, dmg, appcast,
_lib) + smoke tests + the gitignored Sparkle private key.
**Entry Points:** Each script is its own entry; all are orchestrated
end-to-end by [`.github/workflows/release.yml`](../.github/workflows/release.yml).
**Integration:** Consumes the built `.app` artifact; produces a DMG
+ Sparkle-signed appcast entry.

### `.github/workflows/`

CI/CD definitions. `ci.yml` runs on PRs; `release.yml` runs on
`git tag v*`; `appcast.yml` is manually triggered for emergency appcast
rewrites.

**Purpose:** Reproducible release pipeline. The HANDOFF.md walks through
the 10 release iterations needed to get `release.yml` green —
specifically the discovery that `actions/upload-artifact@v4` flattens
macOS bundle symlinks (Sparkle.framework versioned layout) and strips
xattrs (Sealed Resources V2). Fix: **tar the .app between every
job**.

### `tap/`

Source-of-truth for the deployed Homebrew tap at
[PrerakGada/homebrew-tap](https://github.com/PrerakGada/homebrew-tap).
Cask installs the Myna.app DMG; Formula installs the Python daemon
with all 40 transitive PyPI deps (rust toolchain required for
`pydantic_core` + `watchfiles` Rust extensions).

**Integration:** [`release.yml`](../.github/workflows/release.yml)'s
`tap-bump` job pushes URL/sha256 updates to the deployed tap on every
release.

### `launchagents/`

Two `.plist.template` files with `__HOME__` substitution placeholders
that [`install.sh`](../install.sh) expands. The engine LaunchAgent
keeps Kokoro alive on :8765; the daemon LaunchAgent keeps the FastAPI
process alive on :8766. Both have `KeepAlive` and a
`WorkingDirectory=~/.cache/myna` (mlx-audio writes a relative
`logs/` directory).

### `hooks/myna-cc-announce.py`

A Python script the Claude Code Stop hook invokes. Posts to
`POST /announce` so the daemon can register the session for menu-bar
pick. Wired into `~/.claude/settings.json` by [`install.sh`](../install.sh)
in an idempotent JSON merge.

### `hammerspoon/myna.lua`

The pre-Swift v1 menu bar and hotkey implementation. Kept side-by-side
with the Swift app; "second hotkey registration wins" so in practice
users pick one or the other.

## Part-Specific Trees

### `apps/macos/` (macos part)

```
apps/macos/
├── project.yml          # XcodeGen — single source of truth
├── dev.sh               # one-command dev loop
├── Resources/{Info.plist, Myna.entitlements, Assets.xcassets/}
├── Sources/{MynaApp, Network, Audio, Input, MenuBar, Settings,
│           URLScheme, Updates, Logging}/
└── Tests/{Audio, Input, MynaApp, Network, Settings, URLScheme}Tests/
```

**Key Directories:**
- **`Sources/MynaApp/`**: `MynaApp.swift` (`@main`), `AppDelegate.swift`
  (lifecycle + Accessibility prompt + `didBootstrap` guard),
  `AppDispatcher.swift` (chunk→audio engine glue).
- **`Sources/Network/`**: `DaemonClient.swift` (actor over URLSession),
  `DaemonTypes.swift` (Codable models), `SynthesizeStream.swift`
  (multipart boundary parser handling partial reads).
- **`Sources/Audio/`**: `AudioPlayer.swift` (AVAudioEngine + TimePitch),
  `PlaybackQueue.swift` (virtual timeline across chunks),
  `TimePitchUnit.swift`.
- **`Sources/Input/`**: Hotkey + selection + Chrome integration; all
  external-dependency-heavy code lives here behind clean protocols.
- **`Sources/URLScheme/`**: `URLSchemeHandler.swift` — adversarially
  tested in [`AuditSecurityURLSchemeTests.swift`](../apps/macos/Tests/URLSchemeTests/AuditSecurityURLSchemeTests.swift)
  against 11 hostile input fixtures.

### `daemon/` (daemon part)

```
daemon/
├── pyproject.toml
├── myna/{__init__, __main__, app, chunking, config, engine, extract,
│         player, registry, summarize, v2_types}.py
└── tests/{test_*.py, v2_helpers.py}
```

**Key Directories:**
- **`daemon/myna/`**: All production code in one flat package. v1 path
  (`/speak`, `/play/{id}`, `/pause`, `/resume`, `/stop`, `/speed`, `/status`,
  `/announce`, `/registry`) routes to [`player.py`](../daemon/myna/player.py).
  v2 path (`/v2/synthesize`, `/v2/synthesize-summary`, `/v2/status`,
  `/v2/voices`, `/v2/extract`, `/v2/summarize`, `/v2/health`) returns
  multipart WAV chunks or JSON — never touches `app.state.player`
  (verified with a `FakePlayer` trip-wire test).
- **`daemon/tests/`**: 94 tests. The `v2_helpers.py` module shares
  fixtures with the Swift test target via the `docs/native-app/fixtures/`
  JSON catalog.

### `site/` (site part)

```
site/
├── package.json, next.config.mjs, tailwind.config.ts, tsconfig.json, vercel.json
├── public/favicon.svg
├── app/{layout, page}.tsx + globals.css
└── components/[16 .tsx files]
```

**Key Directories:**
- **`site/app/`**: Single-page App Router. `layout.tsx` defines the
  HTML shell + `<Metadata>`; `page.tsx` composes the entire landing
  in a single component tree.
- **`site/components/`**: Each .tsx is self-contained, no design
  system. The `Reveal.tsx` wrapper provides scroll-triggered animation
  via `IntersectionObserver`. `Soundwave.tsx` uses a deterministic
  rounded-sine state to avoid SSR hydration mismatch.

### `dist/` (ops part — release pipeline subset)

```
dist/
├── _lib.sh           # shared helpers (bash 3.2 portable)
├── build.sh          # xcodegen + xcodebuild archive
├── sign.sh           # codesign + Sparkle bottom-up framework signing
├── notarize.sh       # xcrun notarytool submit + stapler
├── dmg.sh            # create-dmg + bg image
├── appcast.sh        # sign_update + appcast.xml
└── tests/test_scripts.sh   # smoke test suite (16/16 pass)
```

## Integration Points

Detailed integration mapping lives in
[`integration-architecture.md`](./integration-architecture.md). High-level
summary of who talks to whom:

| From | To | Type | Where it's wired |
|---|---|---|---|
| `macos` (Swift app) | `daemon` (FastAPI) | HTTP /v2/* | [`DaemonClient.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Network/DaemonClient.swift), [`SynthesizeStream.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Network/SynthesizeStream.swift) |
| `daemon` | mlx-audio Kokoro (external) | HTTP /v1/audio/speech | [`engine.py`](../daemon/myna/engine.py) |
| `daemon` | Ollama (external) | HTTP /api/generate | [`summarize.py`](../daemon/myna/summarize.py) |
| `cli` | `daemon` | HTTP POST /speak (v1) | [`cli/myna`](../cli/myna) |
| `hooks/myna-cc-announce.py` | `daemon` | HTTP POST /announce | [`hooks/myna-cc-announce.py`](../hooks/myna-cc-announce.py) |
| `hammerspoon/myna.lua` | `daemon` | HTTP (v1 surface) | [`hammerspoon/myna.lua`](../hammerspoon/myna.lua) |
| `release.yml` | `tap` (deployed) | git push via deploy key | [`.github/workflows/release.yml`](../.github/workflows/release.yml) tap-bump job |
| `release.yml` | `appcast` GitHub release | gh release upload + EdDSA sig | [`dist/appcast.sh`](../dist/appcast.sh) |
| LaunchAgent (engine) | mlx-audio venv | exec | [`launchagents/dev.myna.engine.plist.template`](../launchagents/dev.myna.engine.plist.template) |
| LaunchAgent (daemon) | `python -m myna` | exec | [`launchagents/dev.myna.daemon.plist.template`](../launchagents/dev.myna.daemon.plist.template) |
| `install.sh` | `~/.claude/settings.json` | idempotent JSON merge (Stop hook) | [`install.sh:43-61`](../install.sh#L43) |

## Entry Points

| Part | Primary entry | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `macos` | [`apps/macos/Sources/MynaApp/MynaApp.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/MynaApp/MynaApp.swift) | `@main` SwiftUI App with `NSApplicationDelegateAdaptor` |
| `daemon` | [`daemon/myna/__main__.py`](../daemon/myna/__main__.py) | `uvicorn.run(create_app(), …)` on `127.0.0.1:8766` |
| `site` | [`site/app/page.tsx`](../site/app/page.tsx) (route `/`) | Single-page App Router landing |
| `cli` | [`cli/myna`](../cli/myna) | Bash wrapper invoked as `myna [--summary] [--speed X] <text>` |
| Ops — release | [`.github/workflows/release.yml`](../.github/workflows/release.yml) on `git tag v*` | 9-job signed/notarized DMG + tap-bump pipeline |
| Ops — local install | [`install.sh`](../install.sh) | Local dev install: venv + symlink + Hammerspoon + CC hook + LaunchAgents |
| Ops — Hammerspoon v1 | [`hammerspoon/myna.lua`](../hammerspoon/myna.lua) (loaded by `~/.hammerspoon/init.lua`) | Legacy menu bar + hotkeys |
| Ops — CC hook | [`hooks/myna-cc-announce.py`](../hooks/myna-cc-announce.py) (invoked by Claude Code on `Stop`) | Posts /announce |

## File Organization Patterns

**One subsystem per folder.** Both the Swift app
(`Sources/{Network, Audio, Input, MenuBar, Settings, URLScheme, Updates,
Logging}/`) and the daemon test suite
(`tests/test_{app, chunking, config, …, v2_{health,status,…}}.py`)
follow this rule. The folder name maps 1:1 to a conceptual capability.

**One file = one role.** Especially in Swift: `DaemonClient.swift` is
networking, `DaemonTypes.swift` is the wire types, `SynthesizeStream.swift`
is the multipart parser. No mixed concerns per file.

**Test file mirrors source file.** `daemon/myna/extract.py` →
`daemon/tests/test_extract.py`; `Sources/Audio/AudioPlayer.swift` →
`Tests/AudioTests/AudioPlayerTests.swift`.

**Fixtures shared cross-part via [`docs/native-app/fixtures/`](./native-app/fixtures/).**
JSON files are read by both pytest (Python) and XCTest (Swift) so the
two language stacks can't drift on what a `V2SynthesizeReq` looks like.

**Bash scripts in `dist/` are bash-3.2-portable.** macOS ships with
bash 3.2; no `mapfile`, no `${var,,}`. See
[`dist/_lib.sh`](../dist/_lib.sh) for the patterns to copy.

**Markdown lives next to the thing it documents.** `apps/macos/README.md`,
`daemon/README.md` (in-package), `site/README.md`, `tap/README.md`,
plus the top-level operator docs in repo root (`README.md`, `RELEASE.md`,
`SECURITY.md`, `STATUS.md`). The exhaustively-scanned cross-cutting
docs are gathered under `docs/`.

## Key File Types

### Swift sources (Sources/)
- **Pattern:** `*.swift`
- **Purpose:** App business logic, UI, integrations.
- **Examples:**
  [`DaemonClient.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Network/DaemonClient.swift),
  [`AudioPlayer.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Audio/AudioPlayer.swift).

### Swift tests
- **Pattern:** `Tests/**/*Tests.swift`
- **Purpose:** XCTest cases. ~91 tests, 0 SwiftLint violations.
- **Examples:**
  [`DaemonClientTests.swift`](../apps/macos/Tests/NetworkTests/DaemonClientTests.swift),
  [`AuditSecurityURLSchemeTests.swift`](../apps/macos/Tests/URLSchemeTests/AuditSecurityURLSchemeTests.swift).

### Python sources (daemon/myna/)
- **Pattern:** `*.py`
- **Purpose:** FastAPI app + integrations.
- **Examples:**
  [`app.py`](../daemon/myna/app.py),
  [`v2_types.py`](../daemon/myna/v2_types.py).

### Python tests (daemon/tests/)
- **Pattern:** `test_*.py`
- **Purpose:** pytest cases. 94 tests passing.
- **Examples:**
  [`test_v2_synthesize.py`](../daemon/tests/test_v2_synthesize.py),
  [`v2_helpers.py`](../daemon/tests/v2_helpers.py) (shared fixtures).

### Next.js code (site/)
- **Pattern:** `app/**/*.tsx`, `components/**/*.tsx`
- **Purpose:** Marketing site.
- **Examples:**
  [`page.tsx`](../site/app/page.tsx),
  [`Reveal.tsx`](../site/components/Reveal.tsx),
  [`Soundwave.tsx`](../site/components/Soundwave.tsx).

### Release scripts
- **Pattern:** `dist/*.sh`
- **Purpose:** Build/sign/notarize/dmg/appcast.
- **Examples:**
  [`sign.sh`](../dist/sign.sh),
  [`appcast.sh`](../dist/appcast.sh).

### GitHub Actions
- **Pattern:** `.github/workflows/*.yml`
- **Purpose:** CI + release automation.
- **Examples:**
  [`release.yml`](../.github/workflows/release.yml),
  [`ci.yml`](../.github/workflows/ci.yml).

### LaunchAgents
- **Pattern:** `launchagents/*.plist.template`
- **Purpose:** macOS user-domain background services.
- **Examples:**
  [`dev.myna.daemon.plist.template`](../launchagents/dev.myna.daemon.plist.template),
  [`dev.myna.engine.plist.template`](../launchagents/dev.myna.engine.plist.template).

### Homebrew tap files
- **Pattern:** `tap/Casks/*.rb`, `tap/Formula/*.rb`
- **Purpose:** Brew distribution.
- **Examples:**
  [`tap/Casks/myna.rb`](../tap/Casks/myna.rb),
  [`tap/Formula/myna-daemon.rb`](../tap/Formula/myna-daemon.rb).

## Asset Locations

| Asset type | Location | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| App icon | [`apps/macos/Resources/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/`](../apps/macos/Resources/Assets.xcassets/) | XcodeGen-managed |
| Menu bar icon | [`apps/macos/Resources/Assets.xcassets/MenuBarIcon.imageset/`](../apps/macos/Resources/Assets.xcassets/) | Used by BirdIcon SwiftUI fallback |
| Site favicon | [`site/public/favicon.svg`](../site/public/favicon.svg) | The only public asset |
| DMG background | `dist/dmg-background.png` (NOT IN REPO) | Listed in STATUS.md as v0.1 optional gap |
| Fixtures | [`docs/native-app/fixtures/*.json`](./native-app/fixtures/) | Shared Swift ↔ Python test data |

## Configuration Files

| Path | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`apps/macos/project.yml`](../apps/macos/project.yml) | XcodeGen spec → generates `Myna.xcodeproj` + `Info.plist` |
| [`apps/macos/Resources/Info.plist`](../apps/macos/Resources/Info.plist) | Generated; do not hand-edit — change `project.yml` |
| [`apps/macos/Resources/Myna.entitlements`](../apps/macos/Resources/Myna.entitlements) | `apple-events` YES, all hardening flags off-permissive |
| [`apps/macos/.swift-format`](../apps/macos/.swift-format) | Swift formatter config |
| [`apps/macos/.swiftlint.yml`](../apps/macos/.swiftlint.yml) | SwiftLint config |
| [`daemon/pyproject.toml`](../daemon/pyproject.toml) | Package + deps + dev extras |
| [`~/.config/myna/config.json`](#) | Runtime config (voice, speed, ports, summary_*) |
| [`~/.config/myna/keybindings.json`](#) | Hotkey persistence; written by [`install.sh`](../install.sh) |
| [`site/next.config.mjs`](../site/next.config.mjs) | Next.js config (note: phantom `motion` import) |
| [`site/tailwind.config.ts`](../site/tailwind.config.ts) | Tailwind theme + plugins |
| [`site/vercel.json`](../site/vercel.json) | Vercel deploy config + headers |
| [`launchagents/dev.myna.engine.plist.template`](../launchagents/dev.myna.engine.plist.template) | Kokoro engine LaunchAgent |
| [`launchagents/dev.myna.daemon.plist.template`](../launchagents/dev.myna.daemon.plist.template) | Daemon LaunchAgent |
| [`.github/workflows/ci.yml`](../.github/workflows/ci.yml) | PR CI |
| [`.github/workflows/release.yml`](../.github/workflows/release.yml) | Tag-triggered release pipeline |
| [`.github/workflows/appcast.yml`](../.github/workflows/appcast.yml) | Manual appcast rebuild |
| [`.gitignore`](../.gitignore) | Excludes Xcode artifacts, Sparkle private key, BMad scaffolding, `HANDOFF.md` |

## Notes for Development

- **Build artifacts are gitignored aggressively.** `apps/macos/build/`,
  `apps/macos/Myna.xcodeproj/` (regenerated by XcodeGen),
  `daemon/.pytest_cache/`, `daemon/myna.egg-info/`,
  `daemon/myna/__pycache__/`, `site/.next/`, `site/node_modules/`,
  `site/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo` (currently dirty in working tree — should
  be added to `.gitignore`), `dist/build/`, `dist/out/`, `*.dmg`.
- **The Sparkle private key file (`dist/sparkle_private_key.NEVER_COMMIT.txt`)
  is doubly-gitignored** (`*sparkle_private*`, `*.NEVER_COMMIT.txt`).
  After the operator stashes it in 1Password and a GH secret, the
  local file should be deleted per
  [RELEASE.md § 1.4](../RELEASE.md#14-sparkle-eddsa-keys).
- **BMad/agent scaffolding directories** (`_bmad/`, `_bmad-output/`,
  `.agent/`, `.agents/`, `.claude/`, `.github/agents/`) are all
  gitignored — they're local AI scaffolding, not part of Myna proper.
- **`HANDOFF.md` is gitignored** (the v0.1.0 ship log) because it
  references internal CI run IDs and operator-only context. A
  historical version exists in commit `f5860c8`.
- **The Swift app and daemon are versioned independently.** Swift app
  version flows from `apps/macos/project.yml:MARKETING_VERSION`
  (currently `0.1.0`); daemon version flows from
  `daemon/myna/__init__.py:__version__` (currently `0.2.0`).
- **There are no test-files in `site/`.** Acceptable for a brochure
  site today, but worth knowing — call out in PRs that touch routing
  or hydration-sensitive components.

---
